agendaTasks.name: Social Content: National Relaxation Day (Aug 15)
agendaTasks.notes:
Prepare and schedule social media content across all 8 platforms for National Relaxation Day.

Event: August 15, 2026
Angle: CBD relaxation bundles, self-care routines, rituals not hacks
Category: Wellness
Funnel: TOFU (awareness/education)
Axis: CBD

Platforms: IG (Reel), FB, Pinterest, X, YouTube, TikTok, Tumblr, LinkedIn
Keywords: Z3 CBD relaxation bundles self-care | Z4 MirthPlus National Relaxation Day
CTAs: Quiz, Shop All, Blog
Note: Great opportunity for relaxation bundle promo — pair with Sleep Drops + Relief Rub

Ref: MirthPlus Social Media Calendar Jun-Aug 2026 V3.0

agendaTasks.name: [BUDGET-DEPENDENT] LegitScript CBD certification - research only this month
agendaTasks.notes:
Cost: ~$3,995 first year + $1,995 renewal - NOT zero-budget. May task is research + scoping only.

This month: research only
- Document full LegitScript application requirements
- Identify which MirthPlus topical SKUs would qualify (Relief Rub, sample, etc.)
- Estimate ROI: certification unlocks Meta Ads for topicals - model expected CAC vs. cost
- Decision deferred until budget available

Why this is in the May plan:
It's the single biggest unlock for paid acquisition once budget exists. Doing the research now means the team can move fast when funding aligns.

agendaTasks.name: [HIGH] Reddit brand presence - start in r/CBD, r/sleep, r/anxiety (FREE)
agendaTasks.notes:
Cost: $0 - Reddit is free. This is reputation work, not promotion.

Rules of engagement:
- Brand handle (e.g., u/MirthPlus_Team) with disclosure in profile bio
- Never drop product links unless explicitly asked
- Goal: become helpful - answer questions, share mechanism explanations, point to research (not products)
- Aim for 5-10 genuine helpful comments per subreddit per week, not posts
- Always follow each subreddit's self-promotion rules (most are 1:9 or 1:10 - i.e., 9 helpful comments before any self-mention)

Why this matters: Reddit threads frequently rank in Google for long-tail conversational queries. A helpful brand presence becomes part of search results passively.

agendaTasks.name: [MED] Build local citation list (free directories) for domain authority
agendaTasks.notes:
Cost: $0

Local citations are free, clean, authoritative links Google values for newer or less-established domains.

Free directories to claim/submit:
- Google Business Profile (already done? verify)
- Bing Places for Business
- Apple Maps Connect
- Yelp business listing
- Local Chamber of Commerce (San Diego)
- Better Business Bureau
- Industry-specific: Hemp Industry Daily directory, CBD Brand directories (free tiers)

Acceptance criteria:
- NAP (Name / Address / Phone) is identical across all listings
- Brand description matches the master brand bio (consistency signal)
- Logo uploaded to each listing using the standalone Mirthy Man icon (square format)

agendaTasks.name: [MED] Add Featured Snippet / People Also Ask blocks to top 5 PDPs
agendaTasks.notes:
Cost: $0 - Pure copy + schema.

For Google Featured Snippets, write a 40-60 word direct answer at the top of each target page using exact-match phrasing from the search query.

Top 5 PDPs to update first:
1. CBD Intensive Relief Rub 2,000mg (target: how does CBD topical work for muscle pain)
2. Dream Formula Sleep Gummies (target: what's in a sleep gummy)
3. Colostrum Powder (target: what is colostrum and what does it do)
4. Creatine Monohydrate (target: what is creatine monohydrate used for)
5. Ashwagandha (target: what does ashwagandha do for stress)

Format for each PDP:
- Top of page: 40-60 word answer block
- Below: 4-8 FAQ Q-and-A pairs (FAQ schema)
- Each Q phrased exactly as a real searcher would type it

agendaTasks.name: [LOW] Affiliate program - scope and vendor research only (no launch in May)
agendaTasks.notes:
Cost: $0 in May - Research only. Launch deferred to June at earliest.

Free / low-cost options to evaluate:
- GoHighLevel native affiliate features - already paid for, $0 marginal. Evaluate first.
- Refersion free trial - then paid
- Goaffpro - free tier available
- UpPromote - free Shopify app for small programs

Output:
- One-page comparison: features, transaction fees, branded affiliate portal availability, FTC disclosure tooling
- Recommendation memo for June kickoff

Why deferred:
The customer referral mechanism inside emails (high-priority task above) handles peer-driven word of mouth in May. A formal affiliate program adds a layer of complexity that doesn't pay back without a content/creator pipeline ready to receive it.

agendaTasks.name: [MED] Quora - set up brand account + answer 5 wellness questions
agendaTasks.notes:
Cost: $0

Quora answers index in Google for long-tail queries and compound for years.

Setup:
- Brand profile with full credentials in bio
- Link to mirthplus.com (allowed in bio, not in answers)

Target 5 questions in May:
- What does CBD actually do for sleep?
- Is CBD safe to take daily?
- How do I know if a CBD brand is legit?
- What's the difference between CBD and THC?
- Does magnesium really help with sleep?

Answer format:
- 200-400 words each
- Lead with the mechanism (Feynman style)
- End with a soft 'the brand I work with focuses on this - happy to share if helpful' - never a hard sell

agendaTasks.name: [HIGH] Submit RSS feed to Feedly (FREE)
agendaTasks.notes:
Cost: $0 - Feedly is free for publisher submission.

Go to feedly.com, create or use existing brand account, search for the MirthPlus feed URL. Once it's discoverable, users can follow it directly inside Feedly.

Why Feedly first: Feedly has the largest active RSS reader audience of wellness-interested users. Free tier is sufficient.

agendaTasks.name: [HIGH] Submit RSS to Feedspot + email anuj@feedspot.com for Top 80 Wellness list
agendaTasks.notes:
Cost: $0 - Feedspot publisher submission is free.

Steps:
1. Submit feed at feedspot.com/fs/publishers
2. Email anuj@feedspot.com requesting inclusion in the Top 80 Wellness RSS Feeds list
3. Pitch should mention: THC-free positioning, five wellness-outcome content pillars, USDA Organic + Triple Tested credentials

Why this matters: Inclusion in Feedspot's curated wellness list exposes MirthPlus to thousands of wellness aggregators that pull from that ranking. This is the single highest-leverage free RSS distribution play.

agendaTasks.name: [Pinterest] 90-day review + scale decision
agendaTasks.notes:
Phase 3 — Pinterest Blueprint V1.0.

Critical decision gate. If still under 10,000 impressions:
- Allocate $50/month to promoted pins
- This is the risk mitigation from the Strategic Blueprint

Also: re-score Channel dimension from Gap Analysis (currently 1/5).

Source: Pinterest Marketing Blueprint Section 7.1

agendaTasks.name: [Pinterest] Launch promoted pins ($30–50/mo) on top organic performers
agendaTasks.notes:
Phase 3 — Pinterest Blueprint V1.0.

Promote top 3 organic performing pins. CRITICAL: non-CBD products only (MB Drops, Ashwagandha, Digestive Enzymes).

Use Pinterest Performance+ campaign type for automated targeting.
Budget: $1–2/day across 2–3 pins.
Track: impressions, clicks, CPC, conversions via Pinterest Tag.

Source: Pinterest Marketing Blueprint Section 3, Task 3.1

agendaTasks.name: [Pinterest] 60-day performance review
agendaTasks.notes:
Phase 3 — Pinterest Blueprint V1.0.

Second checkpoint. Targets:
- Impressions: 10,000–25,000/month
- Outbound clicks: 100–300/month
- Quiz completions from Pinterest: 10–25

Decision: If impressions < 5,000, consider Canva Pro upgrade, increase Idea Pin frequency, or try video pins.

Source: Pinterest Marketing Blueprint Section 7.1

agendaTasks.name: [Pinterest] Quarterly full performance audit + 2027 planning
agendaTasks.notes:
Phase 3 — Pinterest Blueprint V1.0.

Full year-end performance audit:
- Total Pinterest-attributed revenue
- Best performing boards, pin types, content themes
- Channel ROI calculation
- Follower growth trajectory
- Recommendations for 2027 Pinterest strategy
- Re-score Channel dimension from Gap Analysis

Source: Pinterest Marketing Blueprint Sections 7 + 7.1

agendaTasks.name: [Pinterest] CRO audit on Pinterest landing pages
agendaTasks.notes:
Phase 3 — Pinterest Blueprint V1.0.

Optimize Shopify pages receiving Pinterest traffic:
- A/B test product page layouts
- Quiz landing page copy optimization
- Blog post CTA testing for pin-driven visitors
- Review bounce rate and time-on-page for Pinterest-sourced sessions

Source: Pinterest Marketing Blueprint Section 3, Task 3.5

agendaTasks.name: [Pinterest] Holiday gifting campaign (gift guide pins, bundle promotions)
agendaTasks.notes:
Phase 3 — Pinterest Blueprint V1.0.

Create holiday-specific content:
- 'Wellness Gift Guide' carousel pins
- Gift bundle feature pins
- 'Self-care gifts for her' series
- Target keywords: 'wellness gifts for mom', 'CBD gift set', 'self care gifts'

Cross-reference Black Friday / Cyber Monday Shopify promotions.

Source: Pinterest Marketing Blueprint Section 3, Task 3.3

agendaTasks.name: [Pinterest] Scale to 15 pins/day for seasonal peak (Oct–Dec)
agendaTasks.notes:
Phase 3 — Pinterest Blueprint V1.0.

Pinterest health/wellness search volume spikes September through January.
- Increase pinning to 15/day
- Add seasonal content: 'fall wellness routine', 'winter immune support'
- Run CRO on Pinterest-driven landing pages

Source: Pinterest Marketing Blueprint Section 3, Task 3.2

agendaTasks.name: Research & set up Google Ads account for MB
agendaTasks.notes:
Paid Ads — Keyword research, ad copy, landing page alignment. Prepare for May launch.

📌 PINTEREST ALIGNMENT: Google Ads = Track 2 (MB) paid channel. Pinterest Promoted Pins = Track 1 paid channel (non-CBD products only, launching Jun 20 after 60 days organic data). These are complementary, not competing.

See Pinterest Blueprint Section 8 (Budget) and DECISION task for full paid channel strategy.
